calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-25-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Wienkauf for the Petitioner. Margaret Farley for Eleanor Powers.

Mr. Weinkauf and Ms. Farley reported as to the efforts made to find the other heirs on the Decedent's Mother's side of the family. The Court was satisfied as to the efforts and attempts made and will grant the petition upon review of the order.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Guitron.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (382 6ht Ave. S.F. Calif.)
Off Calendar Apr-18-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joel Blackman specially appearing for Steven Weinkauf representing the San Francisco Public Guardian.

The sale was confirmed at $850,450.00. The matter was granted subject to a written order.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Lazatin.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Sep-24-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Steven Weinkauf appearing for the Public Administrator. Margaret Faley appearing for Eleanor Powers. Russell Marne appearing for Sheila McGorty. Mr. Marne stated they brought in Mr. Newsom because Ms. Powers's son wanted to bring him in. Publication has not been done. Ms. Farley argued that it was Ms. McGorty who wanted to bring Mr. Newsom in and her client has the priority to Letters. Court is appointing the Public Administrator as the administrator for this estate. They are to start the heir seach. Mr. Weinkauf will prepare the order.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Rob Harris.
